name: landedspec-construction-import-decision-registers
title: LandedSpec Construction-Import Decision Registers
description:
Three reusable buyer-side construction-import registers for aluminium-profile pretreatment and finish acceptance, supplier document requirements, and FOB/CIF/DAP quote comparison. Blank and unresolved fields are intentional working inputs, not zero values or professional approval.

The package does not recommend suppliers or origins, assign customs codes or duties, quote freight rates, approve shipments, or replace responsible professional review.

sources.title: LandedSpec research assets catalog and source boundaries

resources.name: aluminium-profile-tooling-finish-acceptance-register
resources.title: Aluminium Profile Tooling and Finish Acceptance Register
resources.description: A 108-row control register joining the controlled profile, tool or die, actual extrusion and finishing plants, pretreatment or coating system, production batch, packing revision, and repeat-order release evidence.

sources.title: China aluminium profile pretreatment for Germany — authoritative landing page

fields.name: section
fields.description: Control-workstream grouping for the decision field.

fields.name: decision_field
fields.description: Specific buyer or supplier decision that must be resolved.

fields.name: unit_or_format
fields.description: Required unit, identifier pattern, or evidence format.

fields.name: mandatory
fields.description: Whether the field is mandatory or conditional for the stated use.

fields.name: buyer_requirement
fields.description: Buyer-side requirement or acceptance question.

fields.name: supplier_response
fields.description: Blank working field for the supplier's controlled response.

fields.name: evidence_reference
fields.description: Evidence identifier or dated primary-source URL supporting the response.

fields.name: source_date
fields.description: Source or evidence date, normally in ISO 8601 calendar-date form.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current open or hold state of the decision field.

fields.name: owner
fields.description: Party responsible for resolving or coordinating the field.

fields.name: next_action
fields.description: Next evidence or decision action.

fields.name: profile_id
fields.description: Controlled buyer or supplier profile identifier.

fields.name: tool_or_die_id
fields.description: Controlled extrusion tool or die identifier.

fields.name: finish_batch_id
fields.description: Controlled pretreatment, coating, anodising, or other finish-batch identifier.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Scope, acceptance, or professional-confirmation note.

resources.name: supplier-document-requirements-list-template
resources.title: Supplier Document Requirements List Template
resources.description: A 27-line supplier document requirements list (SDRL) with milestones, purposes, preparers, reviewers, formats, languages, review states, resubmissions, owners, and final-dossier controls.

sources.title: Supplier document requirements before deposit — authoritative landing page

fields.name: requirement_id
fields.description: Stable SDRL requirement identifier.

fields.name: requirement_status
fields.description: Whether the example requirement still needs buyer confirmation.

fields.name: document_or_data_requirement
fields.description: Document, record, certificate, declaration, or data item requested.

fields.name: product_or_line_scope
fields.description: Product family, purchase line, shipment, or dossier scope.

fields.name: due_milestone
fields.description: Commercial or delivery milestone by which the item is due.

fields.name: submission_purpose
fields.description: Approval, review, information, shipment release, or professional-confirmation purpose.

fields.name: supplier_preparer
fields.description: Supplier-side role expected to prepare or coordinate the item.

fields.name: buyer_reviewer
fields.description: Buyer-side or responsible-professional review role.

fields.name: required_format
fields.description: Required document or data format.

fields.name: required_language
fields.description: Contract, market, or customs language requirement.

fields.name: final_dossier_required
fields.description: Whether the accepted item belongs in the final dossier.

fields.name: supplier_document_id
fields.description: Supplier-controlled document identifier or unresolved placeholder.

fields.name: supplier_revision
fields.description: Supplier-controlled revision or unresolved placeholder.

fields.name: transmittal_date
fields.description: Submission date or unresolved placeholder.

fields.name: buyer_review_status
fields.description: Buyer review outcome or unresolved placeholder.

fields.name: next_resubmission_date
fields.description: Next resubmission date or unresolved placeholder.

fields.name: owner
fields.description: Role responsible for the next action.

fields.name: next_action
fields.description: Next evidence, review, or coordination action.

fields.name: boundary_note
fields.description: Reminder to confirm applicability and responsible advice.

resources.name: fob-cif-dap-construction-quote-comparison
resources.title: FOB, CIF, and DAP Construction Quote Comparison
resources.description: A 40-line blank comparison register for reconciling quote inclusions, physical handoffs, risk transfer, import responsibilities, destination charges, evidence, confidence, and next actions across FOB, CIF, and DAP construction-material scopes.

sources.title: FOB vs CIF vs DAP for construction materials — authoritative landing page

fields.name: section
fields.description: Product, commercial, transport, import, evidence, or decision grouping.

fields.name: cost_or_scope_line
fields.description: Cost, responsibility, handoff, evidence, or scope item to compare.

fields.name: buyer_input
fields.description: Blank working field for the buyer's controlled assumption or requirement.

fields.name: supplier_fob
fields.description: Blank working field for the supplier's FOB quote or scope response.

fields.name: supplier_cif
fields.description: Blank working field for the supplier's CIF quote or scope response.

fields.name: supplier_dap
fields.description: Blank working field for the supplier's DAP quote or scope response.

fields.name: evidence_or_quote_source
fields.description: Controlled quote, contract, carrier, customs, tax, insurance, or other evidence reference.

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: Working confidence or unresolved state for the compared line.

fields.name: next_action
fields.description: Next clarification, evidence, or professional-confirmation action.
